formRules.finalDeck: +0 and +1 use each final card's current upgrade level, regardless of how it was upgraded.
formRules.rewardChoice: +0 and +1 use the card form originally shown in standard combat, elite, boss rewards, or merchant shops; later upgrades are not attributed back to the offer.
formRules.avgCopiesWhenPresent: +0 and +1 copies are combined and divided by runs containing either form.
